description: Response from GET /api/system/health after moving /app/data/nanoscribe.db to .bak
observed_behavior: sqlite3.connect() creates a new empty DB file when the original is missing. PRAGMA integrity_check passes on the empty file, so db reports 'ok' instead of 'error'. A new 0-byte nanoscribe.db was created by the health check.
expected_behavior: db should report 'error' when the original database file is missing
bug: sqlite3.connect() creates a new file if missing, and integrity_check passes on an empty DB
